C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\lmstudio_chat_client.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\lmstudio_chat_client.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\lmstudio_chat_client.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\lmstudio_chat_client.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o lmstudio_chat_client.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblmstudio_chat_client.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\lmstudio_chat_client.dir\linkLibs.rsp
